note: Batch 1 seed for the Erotic Pose Catalog. Named positions with structural attributes, apparent-composition, presentation metadata, CC0 Wikidata anchors, and per-participant COCO-17 base-posture + placement (composed by build-keypoints.mjs). Descriptions are original, reference-grade, adults-only. Attribute ids reference pose-vocabularies/*.json. Wikidata QIDs are structured-data CC0.

poses.name: Missionary

historical_sources.name: Dragon Turns
historical_sources.note: First of the Nine Ways: the classic supine union.

poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies supine while the penetrating partner faces them from above, supported on the arms or forearms. It is the archetypal face-to-face penetrative position and the structural parent of a large family of variants.

Variations: Raising the receiving partner's legs onto the shoulders (deep flexion), spreading or closing the legs, placing a pillow under the hips, or the coital-alignment technique (higher, grinding contact). Anal variants use the same arrangement.

On camera: Commonly shot in side profile for full-body framing, or as penetrating-partner POV. Face-to-face contact makes it a staple opener in video.

AI design considerations: Two horizontally-stacked figures, both head-aligned; foreshortening and limb occlusion at the contact point are the main rendering challenges.

poses.description:
Description: The penetrating partner lies supine; the receiving partner sits astride facing them and controls the motion. The defining member of the receiving-partner-on-top family.

Variations: Leaning forward onto the hands (prone-cowgirl), leaning back, squatting on the feet rather than kneeling, and the reverse-facing variant (reverse cowgirl).

On camera: Favoured for penetrating-partner POV and low-angle framing; the upright receiving partner is fully presented to camera.

AI design considerations: An upright astride figure over a supine figure; the two pelvises must register while the upper bodies separate vertically.

poses.description:
Description: As cowgirl, but the receiving partner faces away from the supine penetrating partner, presenting their back and rear to them (and often to camera).

Variations: Upright, leaning back onto the hands, or leaning forward toward the penetrating partner's feet. Anal variant uses the same arrangement.

On camera: The rear-facing orientation makes it a standard penetrating-partner-POV and rear-framing position.

AI design considerations: Same stacked geometry as cowgirl with the top figure mirrored front-to-back; the top figure's face is turned away.

poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner is on hands and knees; the penetrating partner kneels behind and enters from the rear. The archetypal rear-entry position.

Variations: Head-down/hips-up, forearms down, one leg raised, or standing at the edge of a surface. Widely used for both vaginal and anal penetration.

On camera: A dominant position in video; shot from the rear, in side profile, or as penetrating-partner POV.

AI design considerations: An all-fours figure with a kneeling figure directly behind; hip registration and the rear silhouette are the focus.

poses.name: Spooning

historical_sources.name: Mandarin Ducks Entwined

historical_sources.note: Side-lying pairs under blankets — a signature Moche domestic scene.

poses.description:
Description: Nested and same-facing: both partners lie on their sides turned the same direction, the penetrating partner tucked behind the receiving partner like stacked spoons and entering from the rear. Almost no body weight is carried by either partner, which makes it a low-exertion choice and a common slow or resting position; thrusting stays shallow, driven from the hips alone.

Variations: Raising the receiving partner's top leg opens access; the lateral coital position is the closely related side-lying arrangement turned face to face.

On camera: Side profile is the default view, since the nested double curve of the two bodies is the signature framing; close-ups isolate the point of contact.

AI design considerations: Draw two side-lying figures offset along the shared body axis. Limb occlusion between them is heavy, so stagger the arms and give each figure a distinct leg line to keep both silhouettes readable.

poses.name: Sixty-nine (69)

historical_sources.name: Kakila (the congress of the crow)

historical_sources.name: Mutual-oral prints
historical_sources.note: The crow's-congress arrangement recurs across the Edo print corpus.

poses.description:
Description: Reciprocal oral stimulation with the partners aligned head-to-toe, each mouth at the other's genitals simultaneously. In the standard stacked form one partner lies supine while the other holds a prone-over placement above, knees beside the lower partner's head and face dropped to their pelvis. The interlocked silhouette resembles the numeral that names it, and both partners give and receive at once, dividing attention between the two roles.

Variations: One partner supine with the other above, or both partners side-lying; the arrangement carries across any composition: MF, FF, or MM. The upper partner's weight rests on knees and forearms to keep pressure off the partner beneath.

On camera: Shot in side profile or from overhead, the two framings that let the reciprocal alignment read; found in both stills and video.

AI design considerations: Two figures anti-aligned along a single axis, the top one a prone-over placement flipped along the body line. Registration matters at both ends at once: each face must land on the opposite pelvis. Mutual occlusion at the two contact points is the main rendering hazard.

poses.name: Prone bone

historical_sources.name: Clinging Cicada
historical_sources.note: The Nine Ways' prone press, named for a cicada flat against bark.

poses.description:
Description: Flat rear entry: the receiving partner lies fully prone, face down with legs extended and hips against the surface or lifted slightly, while the penetrating partner lowers into a plank above and enters from behind. Weight settles through the receiving partner's pelvis, so thrust travels a shallow, near-horizontal line, and the flattened hips give a tighter angle than kneeling rear entry. The flattened form of doggy style, it anchors the prone rear-entry family.

Variations: A pillow under the hips steepens the entry angle; the receiving partner's legs stay pressed together or spread. The arrangement serves vaginal and anal penetration.

On camera: Rear and overhead framings are standard, with side profile as the alternative; the stacked prone bodies form the characteristic silhouette.

AI design considerations: Render two prone figures layered with only a small vertical offset; limb spread is minimal and occlusion strong, so hip registration and a clean lower-figure outline carry the pose.

poses.name: Lotus

historical_sources.name: Cranes with Necks Entwined
historical_sources.note: The seated embrace of the Nine Ways.

historical_sources.name: The cushion embrace
historical_sources.note: Seated unions on carpets and bolsters are the miniature albums' core scene.

poses.description:
Description: The penetrating partner sits cross-legged or on a surface; the receiving partner sits astride facing them, legs wrapped around, bodies close in an upright embrace. Motion is a close grind rather than thrusting.

Variations: On the floor, on a chair (the related lap position), or leaning back for depth. Emphasises intimacy and eye contact.

On camera: Side profile shows the seated embrace; a slower, intimacy-coded position.

AI design considerations: Two upright seated figures interlocked face-to-face; laps register while torsos stay vertical and close.

poses.name: Facesitting
poses.description:
Description: One partner lies supine; the other kneels or squats astride their face, lowering the genitals to the mouth from above and facing toward either the head or the feet. The seated partner controls pressure and pace by how much weight they lower, while the supine partner works within that hold.

Variations: Forward- or reverse-facing; the seated partner can keep weight partly on the knees so the partner beneath carries only part of the load. It applies across compositions, and motion ranges from a hover to full seated contact.

On camera: Low-angle and side framings emphasise the seated figure's height over the supine body; wide full-body shots establish the layout. A dominance-coded position in both stills and video.

AI design considerations: An upright kneeling or astride figure placed over the supine figure's head, not the hips: straddle priors default to hip placement, so anchor the seated pelvis above the lower face. The supine figure's head vanishes almost entirely under the seated thighs; render the surrounding limbs cleanly so the occluded head is implied rather than deformed.

poses.name: Piledriver
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner is largely inverted, weight on the shoulders and upper back with the hips raised vertically; the penetrating partner stands or squats above and enters downward. A demanding, deep-angle position.

Variations: Vaginal or anal; supported against a wall or with the penetrating partner squatting. Requires flexibility and stamina from the receiving partner.

On camera: An overhead, penetrating-partner-POV showpiece; almost exclusively a video position.

AI design considerations: An inverted (shoulder-stand) figure below a standing/squatting figure; the unusual vertical stacking is the rendering challenge.

poses.name: Fellatio (kneeling)

historical_sources.name: Auparishtaka (mouth congress)
historical_sources.note: The Kama Sutra devotes a chapter to oral congress and its eight acts.

historical_sources.name: The fellatio vessels
historical_sources.note: Oral scenes form a distinct, well-documented class of the Moche corpus.

poses.description:
Description: One partner stands, or sits, while the other kneels before them and performs oral stimulation with mouth and hands. Height difference does the structural work: the kneeling partner's head arrives naturally at the standing partner's hip line, so neither body strains to hold contact. It is the canonical oral position and among the most common arrangements in the catalog.

Variations: The recipient may stand free or sit; the giving partner kneels upright, sits back on the heels, or lies down, adjusting to the recipient's height.

On camera: Receiving-partner POV is a genre staple; side profile frames both figures, and close-ups sit at the point of contact. Common across stills and video alike.

AI design considerations: Place a standing figure with a kneeling figure at hip height directly in front. Head position and hand placement at the contact point carry the pose; the giver's head angle and the vertical drop between the skulls are the key registration checks. The standing figure's legs partially occlude the kneeling silhouette, so preserve a readable kneeling outline.

poses.name: Spit roast
poses.description:
Description: A three-person position: the central partner is on hands and knees, receiving oral at the front from one partner and rear penetration from another simultaneously. The name describes the front-and-back arrangement.

Variations: Any composition; the central partner standing, kneeling, or bent over a surface. A foundational group-sex arrangement.

On camera: Side profile reads all three participants; a wide framing is standard.

AI design considerations: Three figures collinear along one axis: kneeling front, all-fours centre, kneeling rear. Consistent scale and spacing across three bodies is the challenge.

poses.name: Solo display (arched)
poses.description:
Description: A single participant posed supine with the back gently arched to present the body to camera. The archetypal print/centrefold display pose.

Variations: Arched on the back, kneeling arch, or lying prone with the back arched and one knee raised. Ranges from suggestive to explicit depending on state of dress.

On camera: A still-image pose; side profile or full-body framing to read the arch line.

AI design considerations: A single supine figure with an exaggerated spinal curve; the arch and limb line carry the composition.

poses.name: Solo display (standing)
poses.description:
Description: A single model stands upright and unsupported, weight shifted onto one hip so that the shoulder line counters the pelvis, presenting the full figure to camera. As the baseline display pose of print work, it is the reference point from which other standing poses are directed.

Variations: Hands on the hips, arms raised overhead, back turned to camera with a look over the shoulder, or the figure leaning against a wall for a supported line.

On camera: Framed full-length, frequently from a slightly low angle that lengthens the figure; side profile reads the counter-curve of hip and shoulder.

AI design considerations: One upright silhouette with no furniture contact; render the weight shift honestly, with the loaded hip higher and the free knee softened, and keep both feet grounded on a single floor plane so the stance reads stable.

poses.name: Solo display (kneeling)
poses.description:
Description: Kneeling upright on a bed or the floor, the model lifts the torso tall over vertical thighs while the shins fold back beneath, leaving both hands free to frame the body. This mid-height display is a staple of centrefold and glamour photography, sitting between the standing and reclining poses in a print set.

Variations: Sitting back onto the heels for a lower, softer line; knees together or apart; hands lifted into the hair or braced on the thighs.

On camera: Full-body or three-quarter framing shot at subject height, keeping the lens level with the lifted torso rather than above it.

AI design considerations: The hip-to-shoulder line is the key read: an upright torso stacked over vertical thighs with the lower legs folded away. Watch shin and foot occlusion beneath the body, and register the knees to the mattress plane.

poses.name: Solo all-fours (look back)
poses.description:
Description: What distinguishes this pose from a plain all-fours hold is the turn: the model is on hands and knees but rotates the head back toward the lens, supplying direct eye contact from a rear presentation. The rear three-quarter view it produces has made it a staple of glamour and tease work in both print and video.

Variations: Back arched or dropped between the shoulder blades; forearms lowered to the surface; knees together or set apart.

On camera: Framed from the rear or in side profile, wide enough to hold the full body; the look-back is what carries the shot.

AI design considerations: A horizontal torso carried on four vertical limbs. The turned head and the arch of the lower back define the pose; keep the neck rotation anatomically bounded and register all four contact points to one surface.

poses.name: Legs spread (supine)
poses.description:
Description: Supine with the knees drawn up and parted and the feet planted, this is the frontal presentation pose that adult media shoots straight-on. The parted knees open the pelvis to the lens, and the staging is organized entirely around that single line of sight.

Variations: Feet flat on the surface or lifted clear of it; knees widened or narrowed to change the openness of the frame; propping onto the elbows raises the head and adds eye contact.

On camera: Conventionally taken from the foot of the bed at a low angle, and it also supports penetrating-POV and close-up coverage; the parted-knee silhouette is the frame.

AI design considerations: Foreshortening from the frontal camera is the central challenge: the bent thighs compress toward the lens, and the knees must stay symmetric about the midline without merging into the torso.

poses.name: Legs raised (supine)
poses.description:
Description: The geometry here is a right angle: the torso lies horizontal and supine while both legs rise together toward vertical, held straight and static, either side by side or crossed at the ankles. It is a leg-line display, staged to present the length and shape of the legs rather than a frontal view.

Variations: Legs held straight up, crossed at the ankles, or dropped back toward the chest; the hands can rest along the thighs to trace the line.

On camera: Side profile reads the raised leg line most cleanly; a low angle shot up the body exaggerates apparent length.

AI design considerations: The vertical leg line against the horizontal torso is the defining silhouette. Keep both legs parallel and equal in length, resolve any ankle crossing without interpenetration, and let the hip crease mark the corner of the angle.

poses.name: Face down, hips up (solo)
poses.description:
Description: The model settles chest and cheek to the surface while the hips lift high and the knees tuck beneath them, producing the deep lumbar curve that gives the pose its identity. Known in shorthand as face down ass up, it is the classic rear-presentation display and among the most common solo staging poses.

Variations: Arms stretched forward past the head or folded beneath the chest; knees held together or eased apart to alter the rear silhouette.

On camera: Rear and side framing dominate; in profile the exaggerated spinal curve is the signature line the shot is built to read.

AI design considerations: Shoulders low, hips high, knees folded under: the height difference between the two ends of the body is the pose. Keep the cheek in contact with the surface and avoid straightening the spine into a plain kneel.

poses.name: Solo display (squat)
poses.description:
Description: A deep squat taken on the feet alone, knees driven wide while the torso stays upright between them. The pose compresses the whole figure into a compact frontal display, and because it is held without furniture support it asks more balance of the model than the other display staples, keeping it an occasional rather than a default choice.

Variations: Heels flat or raised onto the balls of the feet; hands resting on the knees or dropped between them; weight rocked back onto one hand for stability.

On camera: Frontal or low-angle full-body framing, keeping the folded figure whole in frame without cropping the feet.

AI design considerations: Strongly folded legs beneath an upright torso; the knee and hip angles define the silhouette. Verify the squat is mechanically balanced over the feet, with thigh-calf contact resolved cleanly rather than fused.

poses.name: Masturbation (supine)
poses.description:
Description: The default solo scene position: the performer lies supine, knees drawn up, one hand working between the thighs while the body rocks with the motion. Unlike the static display poses this one is built around continuous action, and the hand is the narrative center of the frame.

Variations: The legs raised toward vertical or spread wide; a toy substituted for the hand; the free hand brought to the chest.

On camera: Covered from the foot of the bed, at a low angle, or in profile, with close-up inserts on the hand; penetrating-style POV framing is also conventional.

AI design considerations: A supine figure with the knees up and one wrist registered at the pelvis. Hand placement is the focal detail, so finger articulation and wrist angle must survive close-up scale, with manual insertion occluded plausibly by the thighs.

poses.name: Masturbation (seated)
poses.description:
Description: The performer sits reclined against the back of a couch or chair, upper body resting into the support, one hand working at the lap in a continuous stroking rhythm. This is the default framing for male solo material, and it belongs to video convention rather than the print tradition.

Variations: The legs planted wide or extended straight ahead; standing and prone versions of the same action.

On camera: Shot frontally for full-body coverage or in POV style from the performer's own eye line looking down the torso, with close-ups on the hand.

AI design considerations: A reclined seated figure whose active arm sets the read: elbow bent, forearm angled inward, hand at the lap. Get the recline angle of the torso against the seat back right, and in POV renders keep the downward perspective of the arms consistent.

poses.name: Legs on shoulders

historical_sources.name: Monkey's Attack
historical_sources.note: Legs raised past the shoulders in the Nine Ways.

historical_sources.name: The second manner
historical_sources.note: al-Nafzawi's raised-legs congress, ankles at the shoulders.

poses.description:
Description: A missionary deepening: the receiving partner's legs are raised and rested on the penetrating partner's shoulders, tilting the pelvis for a steeper angle.

Variations: One leg up and one down, ankles crossed behind the neck, or legs draped over the elbows (deckchair).

On camera: Side profile reads the raised-leg line; a staple escalation from flat missionary.

AI design considerations: The receiving figure folds at the hips with ankles at the partner's shoulder line — leg-to-shoulder registration is the key detail.

poses.name: Mating press

historical_sources.name: Indranika (Indrani's position)
historical_sources.note: Thighs drawn back to the sides of the body — the goddess Indrani's form.

historical_sources.name: El asemeud (the Stopperage)
historical_sources.note: Knees pressed to the chest under the partner's weight.

poses.description:
Description: A fully folded missionary: the receiving partner's knees are pressed back toward the chest while the penetrating partner leans their weight over the fold, pinning the hips at maximum tilt.

Variations: Ankles held by the penetrating partner, or hooked behind their arms; depth of the fold varies with flexibility.

On camera: A video-era staple named in internet vernacular; shot in profile or from overhead to read the fold.

AI design considerations: The receiving figure is compressed — knees near shoulders — with the penetrating figure's mass directly above; the fold angle defines the pose.

poses.name: Coital alignment technique
poses.description:
Description: Grinding replaces thrusting in this missionary refinement, usually abbreviated CAT. The penetrating partner rides high, shifting bodyweight up the receiving partner's torso until the pelvises stack in direct alignment, and motion becomes a small rocking oscillation instead of withdrawal and return. The geometry keeps continuous clitoral contact through every phase of movement, which is the technique's entire purpose: depth stays constant while pressure does the work.

Variations: The receiving partner's legs may lie together or wrap the partner's body; either way the defining elements remain the upward ride and the rocking rhythm.

On camera: This is a sex-manual staple more than a shoot staple, so its record is largely illustrative. Side profile is the informative angle, showing how far the top figure has slid toward the partner's head.

AI design considerations: Build the standard missionary stack, then translate the top figure headward so the pelvises coincide and the shoulders overshoot the partner's. Bodies stay pressed full-length; any daylight between torsos breaks the pose.

poses.name: Butterfly (edge of bed)
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies at the edge of a bed or table with legs raised while the penetrating partner stands between them. The height offset gives a standing partner full range of motion.

Variations: Ankles on the standing partner's shoulders or held wide; hips lifted by a grip at the waist.

On camera: A production favourite — the standing partner leaves the sight-line to the contact point clear in side profile.

AI design considerations: A supine figure on a raised plane with a standing figure at its hips; the surface height difference is essential to the read.

poses.name: Viennese oyster

historical_sources.name: Piditaka (the pressed position)
historical_sources.note: The full press that follows the raised forms in Vatsyayana's sequence.

poses.description:
Description: The complete fold is the pose: the receiving partner draws both legs back until the ankles cross behind their own head, self-locked, rotating the pelvis fully upward while the penetrating partner presses down over the top. This is an extreme-flexibility named position; the receiving spine rounds completely and the body compresses to roughly half its supine length, so the penetrating plank meets a compact, tilted target rather than a long one.

Variations: The legs can be pinned by the penetrating partner instead of self-locked behind the head, and the depth of the fold scales with the receiving partner's flexibility.

On camera: Rare outside flexibility-showcase scenes, it survives mostly in illustration. Overhead framing reads the fold best; side profile confirms the pelvic rotation.

AI design considerations: Place the receiving figure's crossed ankles beside the head, an arrangement that inverts normal limb logic, and verify every joint chain, since generators readily produce anatomically impossible legs here. The top figure's plank should clear the fold, not flatten it.

poses.name: Anvil
poses.description:
Description: A lift defines the anvil. The penetrating partner kneels upright and raises the receiving partner's hips off the mattress and onto their thighs, so the receiving pelvis angles upward while the shoulders and head stay grounded. The legs hook over the kneeling partner's shoulders or arms, closing the structure; the receiving body becomes a ramp from grounded shoulder blades to elevated hips, with the kneeling torso as the support column.

Variations: The hips can rest on the thighs or be held in the air by a waist grip, and the legs can ride on the shoulders or in the crooks of the elbows; each choice changes the tilt.

On camera: The upright kneeling torso keeps the frame open in side profile, and a low angle reads the hip elevation directly; the pose circulates mainly in video.

AI design considerations: Anchor an upright kneeling figure, raise the partner's pelvis onto its lap, and register the ankles at its shoulder line; the grounded upper back separates this from a full fold.

poses.name: Missionary, legs wrapped

historical_sources.name: Silkworm Spinning a Cocoon
historical_sources.note: Her legs wrap him as the silkworm wraps its thread.

poses.description:
Description: The wrap is the working mechanism: from a standard missionary stack, the receiving partner lifts both legs and closes them around the penetrating partner's waist. The clasp pulls the torsos together, tilts the receiving pelvis upward, and lets the wrapped legs draw the partner into each stroke rather than leaving depth to the top figure alone. Body lines stay long and horizontal; only the leg arc breaks the base silhouette.

Variations: Ankles cross at the small of the back for a low, loose hold, or climb higher around the ribs for a tighter clasp and steeper tilt; grip pressure sets the intensity.

On camera: Side profile catches the leg arc against the flat bed line, while overhead framing shows the crossed ankles centered on the partner's back. The wrapped silhouette reads as intimacy, keeping it common in couples-oriented photo and video material.

AI design considerations: Render the receiving figure's legs as a continuous arc over the top figure's lower back, with the ankle crossing as the defining detail. Knees should flare outside the partner's hips; a wrap drawn too low collapses into flat missionary.

poses.name: Standing rear entry (bent over)

historical_sources.name: Late-Spring Donkey
historical_sources.note: She stands bent with hands toward the ground; he covers her from behind.

historical_sources.name: Kubda (the bent-over)
historical_sources.note: Comedy's 'three-obol' position, ubiquitous on symposium ware.

historical_sources.name: The beer-drinking congress
historical_sources.note: The plaques' signature motif: standing rear entry while she drinks through a straw.

historical_sources.name: Bent-over vignettes
historical_sources.note: Several of the papyrus's twelve scenes turn on the standing, bent-forward entry.

poses.description:
Description: Both partners standing: the receiving partner bends forward at the hips while the penetrating partner enters from behind. The standing member of the rear-entry family.

Variations: Hands braced on knees, a wall, or the floor; depth of the bend varies the angle.

On camera: Full-length side profile is the standard framing; works in location shoots where no furniture is available.

AI design considerations: A hinged figure (~90° at the hips) with an upright figure registered behind; the hip fold is the defining geometry.

poses.name: Leapfrog
poses.description:
Description: A doggy-style variant in which the receiving partner drops the chest and forearms to the surface while keeping the hips raised on the knees, producing a steeper rear-entry angle than the hands-and-knees base pose. The spine slopes from low shoulders up to a high pelvis, and the penetrating partner kneels behind at the raised point. Support runs through the knees and forearms, so the pose is stable and easy to hold under sustained thrusting.

Variations: The receiving partner's arms may stretch forward or fold underneath the chest; bringing the knees together narrows the hips into a tighter profile.

On camera: A video staple; the raised-hip, low-shoulder wedge reads instantly from a rear camera or in side profile.

AI design considerations: Build the receiving figure as a wedge, shoulders low and hips high, then register the kneeling figure at the wedge's high point; the diagonal back line is the identifying stroke of the silhouette.

poses.name: Bulldog
poses.description:
Description: Rear entry with the penetrating partner in a deep squat over the receiving partner's hips, feet planted outside their legs rather than kneeling — allowing steep downward strokes.

Variations: Hands on the partner's shoulders or waist for balance; receiving partner flat or on all fours.

On camera: An athletic showpiece; profile framing reads the squat over the mount.

AI design considerations: A squatting figure balanced above an all-fours figure — foot placement outside the partner's legs distinguishes it from kneeling doggy.

poses.name: Bent over furniture
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner bends over a desk, table, or couch arm, torso supported by the furniture, while the penetrating partner stands behind. The office/location staple of the rear-entry family.

Variations: Chest flat on the surface or propped on the forearms; one knee up on the furniture.

On camera: Scene-setting furniture does narrative work; side profile is the standard frame.

AI design considerations: The hinged figure's forearms rest on a raised plane — include the support surface or the pose reads as unsupported floating.

poses.name: Turtle
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner kneels and folds fully forward, seat sinking toward the heels and chest resting near the thighs, while the penetrating partner kneels upright behind. The tucked posture keeps the whole receiving body low and compact, making this the most compressed of the kneeling rear-entry poses and a moderately demanding fold to hold. Entry comes from behind, angled down over the curve of the raised hips.

Variations: Arms fold beneath the chest or extend back along the sides of the body; either choice keeps the fold closed.

On camera: Rarely staged in production; the pose circulates mainly through illustrated position guides, where a single side-profile view captures it best.

AI design considerations: Compress the receiving figure into a near-spherical ball, shoulders approaching the knees, and place the kneeling figure tall behind it. The strong size contrast between tucked and upright silhouettes is what makes the pose legible.

poses.name: Wheelbarrow
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner supports their upper body on the hands while the standing penetrating partner lifts and holds their legs at hip height, entering from behind — the namesake garden-tool geometry.

Variations: Legs held at the ankles or thighs; a kneeling variant lowers the height and effort.

On camera: An acrobatic showpiece framed full-length in profile.

AI design considerations: A near-horizontal figure supported at both ends — hands on the ground, ankles in the standing partner's grip; the lift height must match the holder's hips.

poses.name: Pearly gates
poses.description:
Description: A face-up stack entered from beneath: the penetrating partner lies supine and the receiving partner reclines back on top of them, spine to chest, both faces turned toward the ceiling. Penetration comes from behind despite the open upward orientation, which earns the alias reverse missionary from behind. The upper body's weight rests entirely on the figure below, and motion is driven by the hips of the supporting partner.

Variations: The receiving partner's knees may bend with feet planted outside the partner's legs, adding some self-support, or the legs may extend fully along the partner's.

On camera: Overhead framing captures both faces at once, a rarity among rear-entry positions; side profile establishes the two-layer stack. Circulation is mostly illustrative.

AI design considerations: Draw two same-direction supine figures, both face-up, and give the doubled silhouette a clear vertical offset so the layers separate; without it, overhead views fuse the pair into a single body.

poses.name: Squatting cowgirl
poses.description:
Description: Cowgirl with the rider on the feet in a deep squat rather than kneeling, driving vertical motion from the legs. More demanding and more visually open than kneeling cowgirl.

Variations: Hands on the partner's chest or own knees for balance; brief hovering holds between strokes.

On camera: The open squat is favoured in POV; leg endurance makes takes short.

AI design considerations: A deep-squat figure balanced over a supine figure's hips — feet planted beside the partner's body, knees high.

poses.name: Reverse squatting cowgirl
poses.description:
Description: Reverse cowgirl taken onto the feet: the rider squats over the supine partner facing their feet, weight carried on the soles, and drives the ride with the legs. Facing away presents the rider's back and rear to the supine partner and to the camera, while the deep squat demands real leg strength and balance, placing this among the more athletic on-top positions.

Variations: The rider can lean forward onto the partner's shins for stability, or back onto the hands.

On camera: A staple of POV and rear framing, often shot from a low angle; the squat lifts the thighs clear and opens the sight-line that a kneeling straddle blocks.

AI design considerations: Construct it as squatting cowgirl with the top figure rotated to face the supine partner's feet. The back-to-camera orientation defines the read, so keep the rider's spine and folded legs unoccluded.

Description: An on-top position driven by grinding rather than upright riding: the receiving partner lies flat along the supine partner's body, chest to chest, and works the hips in place. Full-length contact replaces the vertical travel of standard cowgirl, and motion stays small and pelvic; the supine partner lies flat beneath, taking the rider's full weight along the torso.

Variations: The rider's legs may run inside or outside the supine partner's; propping onto the forearms lifts the upper body into a half-raised line.

On camera: Coded as an intimate on-top variant in video; side-profile framing shows the full-length body contact, with rear angles as the alternative.

AI design considerations: The two face-to-face figures overlap almost completely, so introduce a deliberate vertical offset and separate at least one limb pair per figure; without that separation the stacked silhouettes merge into a single mass.

poses.name: Cowgirl, leaning back

Description: The rider sits astride the supine partner facing them, then reclines the torso backward and braces the hands behind on the partner's thighs. The backward lean changes the penetration angle and opens the entire front of the rider's body to view, trading the upright ride for a slower grinding motion anchored by the arm brace. Variations: The recline is a continuum, from a slight backward lean to nearly lying back between the supine partner's legs.

On camera: The open frontal line makes it a POV favourite; side profile captures the reclined diagonal of the rider's torso.

AI design considerations: Tilt the astride figure backward as a single unit rather than bending it at the waist, and draw the hands planted on the partner's thighs; that contact point is what sells the recline.

poses.name: Cowgirl, leaning forward
poses.description:
Description: Cowgirl with the rider folded forward, hands braced on the partner's chest or the bed beside their head — the working default of on-top riding.

Variations: Elbows-down for full contact; hips driven from the knees.

On camera: Rear and side framing read the rider's hip motion; the forward lean keeps faces close for dialogue shots.

AI design considerations: The astride torso pitches toward the partner's head with arms reaching to a chest brace — the diagonal torso over a horizontal body is the key line.

poses.name: Lateral coital (side face-to-face)

poses.name: T-square

AI design considerations: A perpendicular two-body arrangement — best depicted top-down; profile views inevitably foreshorten one body.

poses.name: Kneeling embrace

On camera: An intimacy beat more than a working position; profile framing reads the mirrored kneel, and wide full-body coverage holds both figures.

AI design considerations: Two mirrored upright kneeling figures in close contact. Matched knee lines and matched hip heights sell the symmetry; heavy torso overlap makes the interface the main occlusion zone.

poses.name: Kneeling rear embrace

poses.name: Standing face-to-face (leg raised)

poses.name: Standing rear press (against wall)

Variations: Leg on the shoulder or held at full extension in the partner's hand; wall support behind.

poses.name: Standing 69 (inverted carry)

Description: The vertical, athletic extreme of the 69 family. Nothing here thrusts; the dynamics are static, the standing partner's grip around the inverted partner's torso or hips carrying the entire load while the inverted partner stabilizes by holding on. On camera: A circus-level showpiece that appears mostly in stunts and position guides rather than working scenes, framed full-length so both ends of the carry stay in view.

poses.name: Cunnilingus (lying)
poses.description:

Head-to-pelvis registration is everything: the giver's skull must sit inside the triangle formed by the raised knees, and those legs occlude much of the giver's shoulders. Keep the giver's torso on the lower plane so the two silhouettes stay separable.

poses.name: Cunnilingus (standing receiver)

poses.name: Cunnilingus (legs raised)

poses.name: Sideways 69

Description: Mutual oral taken onto the side: both partners lie head-to-toe on the mattress, each curled slightly toward the other's pelvis, with neither body carrying the other's weight. Keep both silhouettes distinct rather than stacked; overlapping thighs and forearms near each head are the likeliest occlusion errors. Equal figure scale matters since neither body is foreshortened above the other.

poses.name: Fellatio, head back (edge of bed)
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies supine with the head tipped back over a bed or table edge while the standing partner stands at their head — aligning mouth and throat on one axis.

poses.name: Fellatio (recipient reclined)

poses.name: Fellatio (seated recipient)

poses.name: Facesitting (reverse)

Description: The seated partner kneels astride the supine partner's face, oriented down the length of the body below and looking along the torso toward the feet. The sight line runs over the partner rather than away from them, the hands fall naturally onto the lower body, and leaning forward shifts weight off the face and onto the arms; oral or manual play on the partner beneath often runs concurrently.

poses.name: Rusty trombone

poses.name: Anilingus (from behind)

Description: The receiving partner holds an all-fours posture or bends forward at the hips while the giving partner kneels close behind, face lowered to the rear. The read depends on two cues: the giver's dropped head disappearing against the receiver's hips, and face-to-hip contact with no gap. Because the giver's face is largely hidden, silhouette accuracy in the bowed neck and shoulders substitutes for facial detail; keep both figures' knees on one ground plane.

poses.name: Handjob (partner lying)

poses.name: Mutual masturbation (side by side)

Description: Vaginal, anal, and oral penetration held simultaneously by three partners on one receiver; genre vernacular names the state "airtight". Structurally it is the double-penetration stack with a further participant added at the mouth: the receiver rides the supine base, takes the kneeling partner behind, and turns her head to the third. Three independent rhythms must coexist on a single body, which places it at the top of the coordination scale.

Variations: Any double-penetration base can seed the arrangement; the oral partner stands or kneels at the head depending on the receiver's forward lean.

On camera: A four-body composition that demands wide framing to hold everyone, and a recognized gonzo milestone act.

AI design considerations: Four registered figures: supine base, forward-leaning rider, rear kneeler, and a standing partner at the rider's head. This is the most complex arrangement in the catalog, so verify each of the three contact points independently before judging the whole.

poses.name: FFM ride and sit
poses.description:
Description: The classic FFM double-mount: one partner rides the supine partner's hips while the other sits over his face — both on top simultaneously, usually facing each other.

Variations: Riders facing each other (kissing distance) or both facing outward; positions swapped mid-scene.

On camera: Profile or wide framing holds all three; the two upright riders dominate the silhouette.

AI design considerations: Two astride figures on one supine body — one at the hips, one at the face — with believable spacing along the body axis.

poses.name: Gangbang (kneeling center)
poses.description:
Description: The hub arrangement of gangbang and blowbang scenes: one partner kneels at the center while standing partners surround her, and she attends each in turn. Structure barely changes as the group grows, scaling from two surrounding partners upward, because the kneeling figure remains the fixed point and sequencing, not posture, is the real work. The physical demand stays low throughout.

Variations: The surrounding partners can form a line she works along or a circle she turns within; manual attention typically keeps those waiting engaged.

On camera: A wide establishing frame communicates the count; coverage then drops to a low angle that centers the kneeling figure among the standing bodies.

AI design considerations: One kneeling hub with standing figures placed radially around it; additional partners extend the same spoke pattern. Keep angular spacing even so the composition reads as a single group rather than a crowd of unrelated pairs.

poses.name: Train (rear-entry chain)
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner holds all fours while a kneeling partner enters from behind, and a further partner kneels behind that one: the same rear-entry link repeated down a line, every body facing the same direction. The term also covers the sequential practice in which partners take the rear position one after another rather than forming a literal simultaneous chain.

Variations: Group scenes extend the chain with additional same-direction links; the rotation format instead cycles fresh partners through the single rear slot in turn.

On camera: A wide profile is the natural frame; the repeated silhouettes stacked along one axis are what identify the arrangement at a glance.

AI design considerations: Model one rear-entry pair, then duplicate the offset: each added figure copies the same spacing and kneel height down the line. Keep hip-to-hip registration consistent from link to link, or the chain reads as separate couples.

poses.name: Daisy chain (oral circle)
poses.description:
Description: Three or more partners lie head-to-toe in a closed loop, each giving oral to the neighbor ahead while receiving from the neighbor behind: the reciprocity of 69 extended around a circle. Because every mouth is occupied, the configuration is held rather than driven, a largely static geometry whose interest lies in the pattern itself, which is why it appears more often in illustration than in video coverage.

Variations: The loop scales to any participant count of three or more; when the ends fail to join, the open line becomes a chain variant rather than a circle.

On camera: Only an overhead frame reads the circle; viewed from the side, the loop collapses into a row of interlocked pairs and the closure is lost.

AI design considerations: A cyclic head-to-pelvis arrangement rendered best top-down. Reuse the standard 69 registration for each adjacent pair, then curve the sequence until the final figure connects back to the first without breaking any mouth-to-groin contact.

poses.name: Amazon
poses.description:
Description: A role-reversal mount: the penetrating partner lies back with knees drawn to the chest while the receiving partner squats over them, controlling everything from above. Internet-era named and increasingly requested.

Variations: The top partner kneeling instead of squatting; the bottom partner's legs pinned by the top's arms.

On camera: The inverted power dynamic is the appeal; profile framing reads the folded bottom figure.

AI design considerations: The folded legs-up figure is the PENETRATING partner — inverting the usual role geometry; the squatting figure registers over the folded hips.

poses.name: Splitting the bamboo

historical_sources.name: Venudaritaka (splitting of a bamboo)
historical_sources.note: The alternating raised leg is Vatsyayana's own image.

poses.description:
Description: Alternation, not a fixed shape, defines this Kama Sutra classic (Venudaritaka). The receiving partner lies supine and raises one leg to the penetrating partner's shoulder while the other stays extended along the bed; periodically the legs trade places, the raised one lowering as the extended one lifts, the motion Vatsyayana likened to splitting bamboo. Each swap shifts the pelvic angle, so the position cycles between two mirrored geometries rather than holding one.

Variations: The penetrating partner often holds the raised leg at the ankle; the slow alternation between legs is itself the defining motion, not an optional flourish.

On camera: Side profile is the canonical framing, reading the asymmetric split of one vertical and one horizontal leg; the pose appears mostly in illustrative sources.

AI design considerations: Give the supine figure exactly one raised and one extended leg; that asymmetry is what distinguishes it from legs-on-shoulders, and a symmetric render erases the pose entirely.

poses.name: Yawning position

historical_sources.name: Phoenix Soaring
historical_sources.note: Legs raised wide while the partner kneels between.

historical_sources.name: The reclined union
historical_sources.note: Legs-raised reclining scenes recur across the Safavid and Mughal albums.

poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner's legs are raised and spread wide in a V while the penetrating partner kneels upright between them — the Kama Sutra's "yawning" of the limbs.

Variations: Legs resting against the partner's arms or held at the ankles; width of the V varies.

On camera: Low-angle framing reads the open V; the kneeling partner keeps the frame uncluttered.

AI design considerations: A supine figure with raised legs splayed to a wide V and an upright kneeler between — leg spread angle is the signature.

poses.name: Full nelson
poses.description:
Description: Borrowed from wrestling: the penetrating partner, lying or seated behind, hooks their arms under the receiving partner's knees and locks hands behind the neck, pinning them folded and open, both facing up. A gonzo-era signature hold.

Variations: Seated or standing carries of the same lock; the hold's depth varies with flexibility.

On camera: Presents the receiving partner completely frontal to camera — the reason for its genre currency.

AI design considerations: Two stacked face-up figures with the top figure folded — knees near shoulders — and the bottom figure's arms threaded under the knees; the arm lock is the defining detail.

poses.name: Pretzel (pretzel dip)

historical_sources.name: Matsuba-kuzushi (scattered pine needles)
historical_sources.note: The Edo 48's interleaved-leg side entry — the pretzel's ancestor.

poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies on one side; the penetrating partner kneels astride the lower thigh, lifting the upper leg — combining rear-entry depth with face-to-face contact. A production favourite for keeping the receiving partner's body open to camera.

Variations: Upper leg wrapped around the kneeling partner's waist or held at the ankle; degrees of the receiving torso's twist.

On camera: The twisted, open silhouette shoots well in profile and low angle — a staple of every studio's rotation.

AI design considerations: A side-lying figure with a kneeling figure straddling its lower leg, upper leg raised against them — the leg-over-leg weave is the defining detail.

poses.name: Butter churner
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies shoulders-down with legs folded back over their own head while the penetrating partner squats above, dipping in and out — the churning motion that names it.

Variations: Legs together or apart in the fold; the squatting partner's hands on the receiving partner's thighs.

On camera: The deep fold and vertical stroke are the shot; a flexibility showpiece adjacent to the piledriver.

AI design considerations: Distinct from the piledriver by the deeper fold — ankles beyond the head — and the actively squatting top figure; the receiving spine curls to near-closure.

poses.name: Spider (crab)

historical_sources.name: El modefeda (Frog Fashion)
historical_sources.note: Heels drawn to the thighs, partner seated facing — al-Nafzawi's frog.

poses.description:
Description: Both partners recline back on their hands facing each other, hips pressed together with legs interleaved past each other's torsos — bodies forming an X in profile.

Variations: One partner more upright than the other; rocking rather than thrusting drives the motion.

On camera: The mutual recline reads in profile; more common in position guides than in shoots because faces sit far apart.

AI design considerations: Two reclined seated figures joined at the pelvis with interleaved legs — the mirrored back-lean is the signature geometry.

poses.name: Sixty-eight (68)
poses.description:
Description: One partner lies face-up along the body of the partner beneath, head-to-toe, so the lower partner can reach the genitals above their face while the top partner simply receives. The stack runs back-to-front rather than front-to-front, making it the one-way counterpart of the mutual 69; the numeral name records the top figure facing up instead of down.

Variations: The top partner may arch the back to adjust contact or lie flat along the supporting body; because the lower partner bears the full weight, it is usually held briefly as a novelty rather than sustained.

On camera: A guide-book curiosity more than a shooting standard, appearing occasionally as a transition beat within a scene; side profile is the framing that separates the two stacked bodies.

AI design considerations: Compose two supine figures stacked head-to-toe with both faces turned upward; the top figure's upward orientation is the identifying cue and must not flip into a prone fold. Expect heavy torso-on-torso occlusion; keep the lower face registered beneath the upper pelvis and offset the top body slightly so the stack reads.

poses.name: Facefuck (kneeling, irrumatio)
poses.description:
Description: Structurally kneeling fellatio, but the standing partner drives the motion — thrusting with hands at the kneeling partner's head. The active/passive inversion is tagged as its own category throughout the industry.

Variations: Hands at the head or hips; the kneeling partner braced against a wall or bed edge.

On camera: A rough-scene staple; profile framing reads the thrust and head hold.

AI design considerations: Same two-figure arrangement as kneeling fellatio with the stander's hands at the kneeler's head — the grip is the tag-defining detail.

poses.name: Footjob (seated facing)
poses.description:
Description: The giving partner sits reclined facing the recipient, working with both feet at their lap. The anchor position of the foot-fetish category.

Variations: Recipient seated, reclined, or standing; one foot or both; giver's soles toward or away from camera.

On camera: Close-up on the feet with the giver's reclined body in frame; POV framing from the recipient.

AI design considerations: Two facing seated figures joined by the giver's extended legs, feet at the recipient's lap — the extended-leg bridge replaces the usual pelvic registration.

poses.name: Lap dance (grinding tease)
poses.description:
Description: The dancer grinds seated or hovering on the seated partner's lap, facing away — the strip-club tease formalised as a position. Usually clothed or part-clothed and framed as denial-of-contact.

Variations: Facing toward or away; hovering above the lap versus full contact; hands on the partner's knees.

On camera: Wide framing sells the tease dynamic; a stock opener in club-scene narratives.

AI design considerations: Same geometry as the seated lap ride but suggestive-tier: clothing and hover distance carry the meaning.

poses.name: Jockey
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner lies prone, legs together, while the penetrating partner sits upright astride their thighs — riding high like a jockey rather than lying into prone bone.

Variations: Leaning forward onto the hands; the receiving partner's hips propped on a pillow.

On camera: The upright top figure keeps the frame open in profile; a common alternate angle on prone-entry scenes.

AI design considerations: A prone figure with an upright astride figure seated on the back of its thighs — the rider's verticality distinguishes it from the plank-over of prone bone.

poses.name: Bridge (arched receiver)
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner holds a bridge — hips lifted, back arched, feet and shoulders planted — while the penetrating partner kneels between their legs at the raised pelvis.

Variations: Full bridge on the hands versus shoulder bridge; hips supported by the partner's grip as flexibility fades.

On camera: A flexibility showpiece; the arch line is the whole frame.

AI design considerations: An arched figure with elevated hips meeting a kneeling figure's lap height — the arch must stay continuous through the spine or it reads as broken.

poses.name: Sidesaddle cowgirl
poses.description:
Description: The rider sits across the supine partner's hips with both legs to one side — the equestrian sidesaddle transferred. Presents the rider's full profile line to camera.

Variations: Rotating between sidesaddle and forward-facing without dismounting; legs stacked or staggered.

On camera: Chosen exactly for its clean side-on body line; a glamour-forward riding variant.

AI design considerations: An astride figure with both legs on the same side of the supine partner — breaking the straddle symmetry is the entire point and the depiction challenge.

poses.name: Toy riding (solo)
poses.description:
Description: Solo riding of a fixed toy in a squat or kneel — the cam-show staple that maps partner riding onto solo content.

Variations: Deep squat, kneeling ride, or reverse orientation to camera; toy suction-mounted on floor, chair, or glass.

On camera: Low-angle and rear framing mirror cowgirl conventions; a fixture of live-cam and solo-scene formats.

AI design considerations: A single squatting/kneeling figure with riding posture but no partner — the implied fixed object below the pelvis anchors the pose.

poses.name: Reverse gangbang
poses.description:
Description: The gangbang with its polarity flipped: one supine partner lies at the center while three or more direct all attention inward, typically one riding his hips, one seated over his face, and the rest alongside in contact. The outnumbering is the point of the composition; the central figure stays largely stationary while the surrounding partners supply motion through riding and rotation.

Variations: Participants rotate through the two mounted positions over the course of a scene; those waiting remain in contact at the sides rather than withdrawing.

On camera: Wide framing establishes the ratio at a glance; compositionally the shot extends the core FFM double-mount outward with each added participant.

AI design considerations: Start from the ride-and-sit stack, a supine base carrying two astride figures, then repeat the kneel-beside pattern for every additional partner, spacing them along the flanks of the supine body so no figure floats free of contact.

poses.name: Bukkake circle
poses.description:
Description: One partner kneels at the center of a standing ring of three or more, the arrangement built around the facial finish rather than penetration — a JAV-originated format with its own scene grammar.

Variations: Ring size from a trio to dozens; the center figure kneeling upright or sitting back.

On camera: Low angle from behind the kneeling figure or tight on the face; the ring is blocked for camera sight-lines.

AI design considerations: A kneeling hub with standing figures ringed around — radial blocking; the center figure's upturned face is the focal point.

poses.name: Double blowjob
poses.description:
Description: One partner stands while two kneel side by side at his hips, sharing a single point of oral attention: trading, assisting, and alternating rather than each working alone. The coordination is social rather than athletic, which keeps the physical demand low, and the arrangement is both a threesome staple and a fixture of the POV format.

Variations: The kneeling pair may sit shoulder to shoulder or one slightly behind the other; attention can alternate in turns or overlap in simultaneous contact.

On camera: Recipient POV is the default framing, looking down at both upturned faces; external coverage drops to a low angle or moves close on the shared contact.

AI design considerations: Build one standing figure with two kneeling figures clustered at the hips. The paired heads converging on a single focal point are the identifying detail, so keep both faces visible and avoid merging the adjacent shoulders.

poses.name: Side-by-side doggy
poses.description:
Description: Two receiving partners on all fours side by side while one penetrating partner kneels behind, alternating between them. The line-up format of FFM and group scenes.

Variations: More receivers extend the line; the rear partner moving down the row.

On camera: The paired rear presentation is the shot; wide rear framing holds the full line.

AI design considerations: Two parallel all-fours figures with a kneeling figure behind one — depth staggering must keep both receivers distinct in profile views.

poses.name: Doggy over 69
poses.description:
Description: A threesome workhorse: one partner lies supine while a second crouches over them in 69 alignment — and a third enters the crouched partner from behind. Combines oral-below and rear-entry in one stack.

Variations: Any role composition; the supine partner giving or receiving oral from below.

On camera: Profile framing reads all three tiers; among the most-shot FFM/MMF arrangements.

AI design considerations: A 69 pair (supine + all-fours over) with a kneeling third at the raised hips — three-tier vertical registration in one column.

poses.name: Spoon DP (side-lying sandwich)
poses.description:
Description: Double penetration lying down: the receiving partner side-lies between a spooning partner behind and a facing partner in front — the lower-effort sibling of the ride-and-kneel DP stack.

Variations: The receiving partner's upper leg draped over the front partner; sustained slower rhythm than upright DP.

On camera: Overhead framing reads the three-body layering best.

AI design considerations: Three nested side-lying figures — rear spooning, front facing — with the middle figure's leg lifted over the front partner; layering order must stay legible.

poses.name: Reverse DP (leaning back)
poses.description:
Description: The receiving partner reclines back against one supine partner (entered from beneath) while the second kneels in front — DP with the receiving body opened frontally instead of folded forward.

Variations: The bottom partner seated-reclined instead of flat; the front partner standing at a bed edge.

On camera: Chosen over standard DP when the receiving partner's front should face the lens; low-angle framing.

AI design considerations: A reclined-back rider between a supine base and a facing kneeler — the backward lean against the bottom partner's chest is the defining line.

poses.name: Lying spit roast
poses.description:
Description: The spit roast flattened: the central partner lies on their side taking rear penetration from a kneeling partner behind while giving oral to a second kneeling at their head.

Variations: The central partner supine instead of side-lying; front partner standing at a bed edge.

On camera: A sustainable alternative to kneeling spit roast for longer takes; profile framing reads all three.

AI design considerations: A horizontal central figure bracketed by two kneeling figures at opposite ends — head-end and hip-end registration on one axis.
